---
title: "Winners"
---

In 2025, Indonesia was the only country to hold master's level competition and thus an international competition at this level was not held.
The undergraduate winners in 2025 are as follows. 

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false


library(gt)
library(tidyverse)

# Read the data
winners <- read_csv(here::here("data/winners.csv")) 
  

winners_long <- winners %>%
  # Separate names and affiliations into individual rows
  separate_longer_delim(c(names, affiliations), delim = ";") %>%
  mutate(
    names = str_trim(names),
    affiliations = str_trim(affiliations),
    # Combine Team and Country for the header
    team_country = paste0(team_name, " (", country, ")")
  ) %>%
  # Remove year and country (since country is now in the header)
  select(award, team_country, names, affiliations)

```


```{r}
#| echo: false
# 2. Create the Table
winners_long %>%
  group_by(award, team_country) %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(
    title = md("**International Data Quest Winners**"),
    subtitle = "Results by Award Category and Team"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    names = "Student Name",
    affiliations = "Affiliation"
  ) %>%
  # Apply the logo-based color palette
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(100),
    row_group.background.color = "#f8f9fa",
    row_group.font.weight = "bold",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2c3e50", # Deep charcoal from logo
    table.border.top.color = "#2c3e50",
    heading.border.bottom.color = "#e6b8a2",    # Peach accent from logo
    table.font.size = px(14)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#ffffff"),
    locations = cells_column_labels()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(color = "#a65d39", weight = "bold"), # Warm tone for group headers
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  )
```
